mechanism: The 2025-2027 maturity wall ($2.5T) is the most reliable calendar for when full monetary transmission will arrive, as fixed-rate corporate debt insulation (IG WAM ~10.5 years, only 9.5% annual refinancing) is a primary driver of extended lags.
regime_dependence: Holds until the maturity wall passes. The relationship is mechanically determined by debt maturity structure. Weakens for floating-rate or shorter-duration borrowers already exposed to current rates.
